# Comet AI v0.2.9.3 Release Notes

**Release Date:** 2026-04-20
**Version:** 0.2.9.3
**Channel:** Stable

---

## Highlights

This release introduces comprehensive **Apple AND Windows ecosystem integration** including Siri/Shortcuts on macOS, Windows Shortcuts, Voice Control, and Microsoft Copilot integration, plus important bug fixes.

---

## New Features

### 🍎 Siri & Apple Shortcuts Integration

**URL Scheme (`comet-ai://`)**
All actions accessible via Shortcuts app:
| URL | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `comet-ai://chat?message=...` | Send message to AI |
| `comet-ai://search?query=...` | Smart web search |
| `comet-ai://create-pdf?content=...&title=...` | Generate PDF |
| `comet-ai://navigate?url=...` | Open website |
| `comet-ai://run-command?command=...` | Execute terminal |
| `comet-ai://volume?level=0-100` | Set volume |
| `comet-ai::open-app?appName=...` | Launch app |
| `comet-ai::screenshot` | Capture screen |
| `comet-ai::schedule?task=...&cron=...` | Schedule task |
| `comet-ai::ask-ai?prompt=...&speak=true` | Ask AI + speak |

**Siri Voice Commands:**
- "Ask Comet AI [question]"
- "Search [query] with Comet AI"
- "Create PDF in Comet AI"
- "Run [command] in Comet AI"
- "Schedule [task] in Comet AI"

### 🎤 Voice Control
- **Dictation**: Press ⌘⇧D to dictate, text sent to AI
- **Text-to-Speech**: AI responses can be spoken aloud
- **AppleScript Bridge**: Pre-built scripts for automation
- **Voice Selection**: Multiple macOS voices available

### 📱 Raycast Integration
Comet supports Raycast extensions via URL scheme:
- Open Raycast → type "Comet" → use commands

### 🖨️ PDF Generation Improvements
- Removed "Protected Ecosystem" watermark footer
- Simplified, cleaner PDF output
- Professional document generation

### 📄 Document Templates (5)
| Template | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `professional` | Navy blue cover, research document |
| `executive` | White, priority badges |
| `academic` | Merriweather font, academic papers |
| `minimalist` | Space Grotesk, clean design |
| `dark` | Oxanium, cyber styling |

---

### 🪟 Windows Integration (NEW!)

**Windows Shortcuts + Voice + Copilot:**
| Feature | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| URL Scheme | `comet-ai://` for Windows Shortcuts |
| Voice Control | PowerShell Speech Recognition + TTS |
| Copilot | Open Microsoft Copilot directly |
| Power Automate | Flow triggers for automation |

**Windows Voice:**
```javascript
// Text-to-Speech
window.electronAPI.windows.voice.speak('Hello from Comet!');

// Speech Recognition  
window.electronAPI.windows.voice.listen({ timeout: 10000 });
```

**Microsoft Copilot:**
```javascript
// Open Copilot app or web
window.electronAPI.windows.openCopilot();
```

---

### 🐧 Linux Integration (NEW!)

**GNOME + KDE Desktop Integration:**
| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Desktop Detection | GNOME, KDE, XFCE, MATE, Cinnamon |
| URL Scheme | `comet-ai://` for desktop shortcuts |
| Voice (TTS) | espeak with 80+ voices |
| Notifications | notify-send, kdialog support |
| Volume Control | pactl (PulseAudio), qdbus (KDE) |
| Desktop Shortcuts | .desktop file generation |

**Linux Voice:**
```javascript
// Text-to-Speech via espeak
window.electronAPI.linux.voice.speak('Hello from Comet!');

// Get available voices
const voices = await window.electronAPI.linux.voice.getVoices();
// [{ name: 'english', language: 'en' }, ...]
```

**Linux Notifications:**
```javascript
await window.electronAPI.linux.notify('Title', 'Message body');
```

**Desktop Shortcuts:**
```javascript
await window.electronAPI.linux.createShortcut('Open AI', 'chat', { message: 'Hello' });
```

---

### 🔄 Native Click Alternatives

**Cross-Platform Automation Priority Chain:**
| Priority | macOS | Windows | Linux |
|----------|-------|---------|-------|
| 1st | steve CLI | nut.js | xdotool |
| 2nd | AppleScript | xa11y | xte/xinput |
| 3rd | robotjs | robotjs | robotjs |

**Platform OCR Priority Chain:**
| Priority | macOS | Windows | Linux |
|----------|-------|---------|-------|
| 1st | uniOCR (Vision) | uniOCR (Windows) | uniOCR (Tesseract) |
| 2nd | RustO! (PaddleOCR) | RustO! | RustO! |
| 3rd | Native Vision | Windows OCR | AT-SPI2 |
| 4th | Tesseract.js | Tesseract.js | Tesseract.js |

---

## macOS Native Features

### Apple Intelligence
- Native Swift integration
- System readiness detection
- Local summarization (on supported Macs)
- Image generation experiments
- Genmoji support

### Native Swift Panels
- Floating sidebar (Glass/Blur)
- Action chain panel
- Permissions panel
- Settings panel

---

## Bug Fixes

1. **TypeScript Errors Fixed:**
   - `execPromise` return type (stdout vs string)
   - `process.defaultAgent` type assertion

2. **PDF Generation:**
   - Removed duplicate footer section
   - Clean watermark handling

3. **Cleanup:**
   - Removed deprecated Thuki components (migrated to native Swift)

---

## Files Changed

- **63 files changed**
- **+2,758 lines added**
- **-10,790 lines removed**

---

## Known Issues

- Windows microphone access requires native implementation (future)
- Linux voice control experimental

---

